arts.ttl: Kierney Tierney immediate Celtic transfer return boost emerges as Arsenal starlet’s arrival on big stage triggers exit
arts.sum: Talented youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly has provided Mikel Arteta with another option at left back

arts.ttl: Premier League confirm Arsenal referee decision after Man City controversy
arts.sum: It’s just the second Gunners game he has taken charge of since he showed Leandro Trossard a controversial red card against Man City last year. The referee showed Trossard a second yellow card for kicking the ball away in first half added time of the 2-2 draw with Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium back in September.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face double January transfer decision as £67m Mikel Arteta problem emerges
arts.sum: Even though Arsenal may be in the market for a new frontman, it remains to be seen if the Gunners have plans to sign both Cunha and Sesko in the weeks and months ahead. The report claims that Wolves star Matheus Cunha could still depart Molineux before the transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Arsenal learn Benjamin Sesko transfer truth as new striker search continues
arts.sum: Sesko was linked with a move to Arsenal last summer before he signed a new long-term contract with Leipzig. Arsenal have been widely tipped to try and sign a new striker for more than a year, and those rumours have only intensified in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: 'For sure’: Leandro Trossard says Arsenal currently have a player he prefers to Dennis Bergkamp
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard has been building his ultimate five-a-side team made up of past and present Arsenal players. Speaking to the Premier League, Leandro Trossard has...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta delivers 'very positive news' ahead of Arsenal's Champions League clash against Dinamo Zagreb - as two key stars return from injury
arts.sum: Saturday's draw at the Emirates will feel like two points dropped for Arsenal, who led by two goals early in the second half before Youri Tielemans and Ollie Watkins levelled the game.

arts.ttl: Explaining the 2024/25 UEFA Champions League system as Arsenal and Aston Villa aim to progress with Liverpool
Mikel Arteta hopeful William Saliba will be fit in time for Man City clash
arts.sum: Saliba will not be available for Arsenal’s penultimate Champions League group match against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Calafiori returns available for Arsenal’s Champions League clash
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori has fully recovered from his latest injury as Arsenal coach Mikel Arteta confirmed...

arts.ttl: Awkward moment Emmanuel Petit mistakenly claims Arsenal legend Pat Rice is dead, live on Sky Sports - as Frenchman apologises for gaffe
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Emmanuel Petit was forced to apologise when he wrongly claimed Gunners legend Pat Rice was dead, live on TV.
